Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimDrawCallTracking
Added_Other.mechanism: Optimizes how the game tracks rendering calls to improve performance.
Added_Other.purpose: Reduces lag and improves the visual experience in games.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFileMeshInstanceSupport
Added_Other.mechanism: Adds support for a more efficient type of mesh instance.
Added_Other.purpose: Reduces memory usage and improves performance for 3D models.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFixCsgColor3
Added_Other.mechanism: Fixes color handling in CSG (Constructive Solid Geometry) operations.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures that colors appear correctly when using CSG shapes.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFixDecalUvRange
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the UV mapping range for decals to improve appearance.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures decals look better and fit correctly on surfaces.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFixExtents
Added_Other.mechanism: Optimizes the calculation of object extents in the game engine.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances performance by reducing lag when rendering objects.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFixFileMeshScale
Added_Other.mechanism: Fixes the scaling issues with file meshes to ensure they display correctly.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves the appearance of custom meshes in games, making them look as intended.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFixInstanceUvOffset
Added_Other.mechanism: Fixes the UV offset calculations for 3D instances.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances visual quality by ensuring textures are applied correctly.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFixMaterialService
Added_Other.mechanism: Improves the material service for better handling of textures.
Added_Other.purpose: Provides smoother and more accurate textures in games.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFixMeshColor
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts how colors are applied to slim meshes.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures that slim characters have consistent and appealing colors.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFixSpecialFileMeshColor
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts color settings for specific mesh files.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves the appearance of certain 3D models in games.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFixSpecialMeshScaling
Added_Other.mechanism: Refines the way special meshes are scaled in the game engine.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves the appearance and consistency of 3D models in games.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimInvalidatePartiallyStreamedModelInstances
Added_Other.mechanism: Optimizes how partially loaded models are updated in memory.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves performance by reducing lag when loading parts of models.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimSpecialMeshHeadSupport
Added_Other.mechanism: Adds support for a new type of head mesh that is slimmer.
Added_Other.purpose: Gives players more options for customizing their avatars with stylish head shapes.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimSpecialMeshPlastic
Added_Other.mechanism: Optimizes the rendering of plastic materials in special meshes.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances visual quality and performance of plastic objects in games.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimSpecialMeshPlastic2
Added_Other.mechanism: Introduces a new type of plastic material for special meshes.
Added_Other.purpose: Provides developers with more options for creating visually appealing and unique game assets.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimTranscoderDecalTransparency
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the way decal transparency is processed in the game.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances the visual quality of decals, making them look better and more realistic.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimTranscoderDontTransformFileMeshUV
Added_Other.mechanism: Prevents the UV mapping of file meshes from being altered during transcoding.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures that the textures on file meshes appear correctly without distortion.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimTranscoderFixCSGMaterial
Added_Other.mechanism: Fixes issues with the material properties in the CSG (Constructive Solid Geometry) system during asset transcoding.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures that materials look correct and consistent in games, enhancing the overall visual experience.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimTranscoderFixMeshUVs
Added_Other.mechanism: Fixes how textures are applied to 3D models in games.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves the visual quality of 3D objects for a better gaming experience.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimTranscoderGenerateParts3
Added_Other.mechanism: Optimizes the way parts are generated in the game engine.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves performance and reduces lag for players when using complex parts in their games.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimTranscoderOnlyUseScale
Added_Other.mechanism: Optimizes video transcoding by limiting it to scale adjustments.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves video playback efficiency for smoother experiences.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimTranscoderResetColorForDecals
Added_Other.mechanism: Resets color settings for decals during the transcoding process.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves the visual quality of decals when they are uploaded.
